docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$ 1100.OO US CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$ 1100.OO US CURRENCY
DECLARATION OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,100.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
